topic: Staying clean when everything falls apart

samples.share:
See, last week my daughter slammed the phone down silent again, house empty like all those graves I shoveled dirt over, but I clutched this chipped cup from meeting two and dialed my sponsor before the pipe called louder.

Now you almost bolted today but rang that sponsor first and stayed— that's dirt under your nails holding ground.

I set the cup down slow, everything falls but not us tonight.
